description: In a low profile silhouette with absolute visual appeal, this shoe from skechers makes for a perfect addition to your casual wardrobe. The smooth leather and suede upper with stitch detailing gives it a rugged look, making it a fab buy. Upper Smooth leather upper with suede overlays on the sides of the midfoot Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Relaxed Step footbed for all-day ergonomically padded comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with strategically placed multi-directional lugs throughout for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
